title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Cars24 Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Cars24 Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Cars24 Holdings Services invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Aurangabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Cars24 Holdings Services:
Cars24 Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cars24 Holdings Services!
